# CC for SF — Claude Code for Salesforce Admins

> CC for SF is a hands-on mini-course that teaches Salesforce Admins how to use Claude Code (Anthropic's agentic CLI) to build Flows, custom fields, validation rules, and Apex — without clicking through Setup or writing code by hand. Created by Amit, 8× Salesforce Certified GTM Engineer.

Key facts:

- Price: $97 one-time, lifetime access. 30-day money-back guarantee.
- Tool dependency: Claude Max subscription ($100/month) — Anthropic moved Claude Code access into the Max plan in 2026.
- Audience: working Salesforce Admins who know the platform and want to ship faster. Not for existing Salesforce developers and not a cert-prep course.
- Salesforce license: works with any org on Enterprise, Unlimited, or Developer edition. No Agentforce license needed.
- Independence: not affiliated with or endorsed by Salesforce or Anthropic. Salesforce and Claude are trademarks of their respective companies.
- Current status: pre-launch. Enrollment is via waitlist.

## Core pages

- [Homepage](https://ccforsf.com/): Course overview, modules, pricing, FAQ, and waitlist signup.
- [About Amit](https://ccforsf.com/about): Instructor bio, credentials, and why the course exists.
- [Blog](https://ccforsf.com/blog): Tutorials and field notes on using Claude Code with Salesforce.

## Blog posts

- [Salesforce is shipping an AI that watches you. Here's why admins still need Claude Code.](https://ccforsf.com/blog/agent-albert-and-claude-code): Analysis of Salesforce's Agent Albert announcement and why admins still need Claude Code as a builder's tool.
- [Build Agentforce agents without hand-writing Agent Script](https://ccforsf.com/blog/agentforce-with-claude-code): How to describe an Agentforce agent in English and let Claude Code generate and deploy the .ascript file.
- [Claude Code vs Agentforce: when to use which](https://ccforsf.com/blog/claude-code-vs-agentforce): Decision framework comparing Anthropic's Claude Code CLI with Salesforce's Agentforce platform.
- [AI for Salesforce Flows](https://ccforsf.com/blog/ai-for-salesforce-flows): The admin's guide to generating record-triggered, screen, and scheduled Flows with Claude Code.
- [Migrating Aura components to LWC with Claude Code](https://ccforsf.com/blog/migrating-aura-to-lwc-with-claude-code): Using the Salesforce DX MCP tools to port Aura components to LWC in minutes.
- [Validation rules with Claude Code](https://ccforsf.com/blog/validation-rules-with-claude-code): From plain-English rule description to deployed formula and error message.
- [Your first CLAUDE.md for a Salesforce DX project](https://ccforsf.com/blog/your-first-claude-md-for-salesforce): The starter CLAUDE.md file every Salesforce DX project should ship with.

## What the course covers

- Zero to connected: installing Claude Code and connecting it to a Salesforce DX org.
- Custom fields, page layouts, and permission sets from a single prompt.
- Record-triggered, screen, and scheduled Flows from plain English.
- Validation rules and Apex triggers — describe the logic, get working code.
- Debugging: what to do when Claude gets it wrong.
- The prompt library: 20+ copy-paste prompts the instructor uses in production.
